title: [Nautilus, Glassthread Chamber]
description: Beyond the entry, an expansive chamber unfolds beneath the vaulted arcs of the immense nautilus.  Gossamer filaments of glassthread vine crisscross the septa, each strand swaying gently in the lazy currents that drift through.  Flecks of bioluminescent plankton cling to the glassthread, lending the room a soft, dynamic shimmer.  Broad, nacreous ribs of shell curve overhead, and silken sediment settles in gentle riffles along the floor that mirror the graceful ridges above.
